name: 36" x 24" Over the Mantel Mirror - Threshold™
description:
Add a beautiful and functional accent to your home walls with this Over-the-Mantel Mirror from Threshold™. Designed in a unique shape that has square bottom edges and rounded top ones, this over-the-mantel mirror gives an unexpected twist to your usual wall-mount mirror look. A sleek metal frame provides a clean and modern design, while this rounded-edge wall mirror also comes with hardware so it's ready to mount. Perfect for hanging above a console table, fireplace mantel or dresser, it's sure to add a sleek modern touch that improves the look of almost any room.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
